When is greenhouse bed 48 watered?

[distractor:0] The cafe serves soup at noon.
[distractor:1] The west elevator is under inspection.
[distractor:2] The river path is closed after storms.

Response requirements:
Use decisive evidence only.
results.expected: Greenhouse bed 48 is watered on Thursday.
